welcome_message:
Welcome to Kokoro Doctor! Our mission is to make AI-powered heart health accessible to everyone. 

As a proud member of Harvard Innovation Labs, our team of experts in AI, healthcare, and business is dedicated to bridging the gap between early detection and life-saving action. Leveraging cutting-edge technology and extensive research, we provide patients, doctors, and caregivers with top-tier tools for cardiac care.

Our commitment to affordable, data-driven healthcare positions us as a leader in the future of heart health solutions. We envision a world where no one suffers due to lack of access to quality cardiac care.
